basics.name: Bharathkumar Hegde
basics.summary: PhD researcher specialising in extracting real-world value from state-of-the-art AI technologies by integrating them with established theories and systems, with publications in IEEE IV and AI Communications. Backed by more than 5 years of industry experience at Intel and Commvault, I bridge academic research with production-ready applications of RL, Computer Vision, LLMs, and Multi-Agent Systems.

work.summary: Designed a novel lane change controller for Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) by integrating Multi-Agent RL with Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) to balance conflicting requirements of efficiency and safety.
highlights: Designed a novel lane change controller for CAVs by integrating Multi-Agent RL with CBFs to balance conflicting requirements of efficiency and safety
Published technical papers in the AI Communications journal and IEEE IV conferences
Published technical papers in the ATT workshops held in conjunction with IJCAI 2022 and ECAI 2024
Contributed to teaching undergraduate and postgraduate modules at Trinity College Dublin, including Machine Learning, Data Structures, and Programming Project, through demonstrations and tutorials

work.summary: Applied machine learning and computer vision techniques in a hybrid research internship in Dublin.
highlights: Scaled image classification models using Kubeflow pipelines for faster training and evaluation
Increased the accuracy of an image recognition model for varying lighting conditions using Continual Learning
Developed a dynamic text clustering method to group similar documents from a large unstructured dataset and identify new groups as new documents are included

work.summary: Developed and maintained premium backup and restore features in the Commvault® data management product.
highlights: Developed and maintained premium backup and restore features in the Commvault® data management product
Actively interacted with worldwide customers to understand and solve issues related to the MySQL backup agent

work.summary: Contributed to API developments for backup agents of Big Data and Cloud applications.
highlights: Contributed to API developments for the backup agents of Big Data Applications like Hadoop and MongoDB
Contributed to API developments for the backup agents of Cloud Applications like Amazon RDS and Azure Storage
Developed a web application to support 1-Touch recovery workflow for Unix file systems

work.summary: Developed and maintained Java UI features and SQL stored procedures in Commvault data management software.
highlights: Developed and maintained Java UI features in Commvault data management software
Implemented SQL stored procedures to query and process large-scale enterprise data

work.summary: Led a programming club under the IEEE UVCE student branch.
highlights: Participated in programming contests like ACM ICPC, IEEE Xtreme, and E-Yantra
Organised monthly programming contests that encouraged many students to develop programming skills

publications.name: A Collaborative Safety Shield for Safe and Efficient CAV Lane Changes in Congested On-Ramp Merging
publications.summary: A collaborative safety shield framework for safe and efficient CAV lane changes in congested on-ramp merging scenarios.

publications.name: Safe and Efficient CAV Lane Changing Using Decentralised Safety Shields
publications.summary: Proposes MARL-HSS combining Hybrid Safety Shield with MARL for safe and efficient CAV lane changes.

publications.name: Safe CAV Lane Changes Using MARL and Control Barrier Functions
publications.summary: A hybrid framework integrating MARL with Control Barrier Functions for provably safe CAV lane changes.

publications.name: Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning for Safe Lane Changes by Connected and Autonomous Vehicles: A Survey
publications.summary: Survey of MARL-based lane changing methods for CAVs and safe RL methods for ensuring safety.

publications.name: Design of AI-Based Lane Changing Models in Connected and Autonomous Vehicles: a Survey
publications.summary: Survey of AI-based lane changing models for CAVs, covering classical control and deep learning approaches.

teaching.description: Lab demonstrations and tutorial support for postgraduate Machine Learning module.
Lab demonstrations and tutorial support for postgraduate Data Visualisation module.
Tutorial and lab support for undergraduate Data Structures module.

teaching.course: Research Methods (PhD and MSc by Research)
teaching.description: Support for Research Methods module for PhD and MSc by Research students.
Lab demonstrations for undergraduate Microprocessor Systems module.
